CONTENT.International career: Kyriakou made his debut with the Cyprus national football team on 5 March 2014 in a friendly match against Northern Ireland when he replaced Vincent Laban in the 67th minute.

SUMMARY: Charalampos "Champos" Kyriakou (Greek: Χαράλαμπος «Χάμπος» Κυριάκου; born 9 February 1995) is a Cypriot footballer who plays as a midfielder for Apollon Limassol, which he captains, and the Cyprus national team.
